prompt:
Update all app CUE configs to use auto_stop: suspend and min_machines_running: 0 across all environments. This reflects the desired state: 1 machine per environment, all suspendable when idle.

## Changes needed

In all prod.cue files (apps/flux/prod.cue, apps/web/prod.cue, apps/balance/prod.cue), change:
- `auto_stop_machines: "off"` → `auto_stop_machines: "suspend"`
- `min_machines_running: 1` → `min_machines_running: 0`

In all staging.cue files (apps/flux/staging.cue, apps/balance/staging.cue), change:
- `min_machines_running: 1` → `min_machines_running: 0`
(staging already has auto_stop: suspend)

Also check apps/web/ for a staging.cue and update if it exists.

Also check all preview.cue files — they should already have suspend/0 but verify.

## Files
- apps/flux/prod.cue
- apps/flux/staging.cue
- apps/balance/prod.cue
- apps/balance/staging.cue
- apps/web/prod.cue
- apps/web/staging.cue (if exists)
- Any preview.cue files

## Acceptance criteria
- All environments use auto_stop_machines: "suspend"
- All environments use min_machines_running: 0
- cue vet passes for all apps
- CI passes
